disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Thick, white, clumpy 'cottage cheese-like' vaginal discharge
trigger_question_examples: Have you noticed any discharge, and what does it look like?
Is there any change in discharge — colour, thickness, amount?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes — it's thick and white and clumpy, kind of like cottage cheese.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Intense vulvar itching with an external raw, burning sensation
trigger_question_examples: Can you describe exactly what you're feeling — itch, burning, soreness?
Where is it worst — inside or on the outside skin?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's an intense itch and the outside skin feels raw and burning, like it's on fire.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Recent completed 7-day course of broad-spectrum antibiotics (about two weeks ago) for a sinus infection
trigger_question_examples: Have you taken any medicines or antibiotics recently?
Has anything changed in the last few weeks — new medicines, illness?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I did finish a course of antibiotics about two weeks ago for a sinus infection.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No foul or fishy odour reported
trigger_question_examples: Have you noticed any strong or fishy smell?
Does the discharge have an odour?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, I haven't noticed any bad or fishy smell.
disclosure_items.patient_deflection_template: I don't think there's a smell, I haven't really checked.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: External dysuria (stinging when urine contacts the skin) and pain with intercourse
trigger_question_examples: Does it sting or hurt when you pass urine?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes — it really stings on the outside when I wee, and it's painful during sex.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No fever, feels systemically well; no severe lower abdominal or pelvic pain
trigger_question_examples: Have you had any fever, chills, or feeling generally unwell?
Any deep pain low in your tummy or pelvis?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No fever, I checked — 36.8. I feel okay in myself apart from how uncomfortable this is. No deep tummy pain.

patient_initiated_exchanges.patient_text: Can you just give me an antibiotic to clear it up quickly? That's what worked on my sinuses.
patient_initiated_exchanges.expected_ai_doctor_response_quality: Explain gently that antibiotics would not help this and in fact the recent antibiotics are the likely trigger — the appropriate treatment is an antifungal (topical cream/pessary, or a single oral dose). Do not accede to the request for antibiotics.
